base.name: AV on 5yr timeline
base.description: Waymo reaches 1M+ weekly rides. AEB frequency decline becomes sell-side consensus. PGR re-rates lower. LKQ revenue visibly declining.
base.confirmingSignals: Waymo expands to 20+ cities; sequential ride growth; PGR combined ratio improvement attributed to frequency; CCC repairable claims down >15% YoY.
base.whatWouldHappen: GOOGL re-rates as Waymo value becomes visible. NVDA automotive segment accelerates. PGR and LKQ shorts work. CPRT hedge flat to slight drag.
base.benefits: GOOGL, NVDA on adoption pace; PGR/LKQ shorts on frequency decline.
base.hurt: CPRT (fewer total losses if frequency declines faster than severity rises).

delay.name: 8–10yr adoption
delay.description: No fatal incident but permitting bottlenecks, consumer skepticism, and slow city-by-city expansion delay widespread adoption. GOOGL and NVDA grow on core businesses.
delay.confirmingSignals: Waymo city expansion slows; consumer AV trust stagnant (AAA survey); city permit timelines extending; frequency decline not yet visible in carrier data.
delay.whatWouldHappen: Longs +10–20% on core business growth. PGR/LKQ option premiums expire worthless (lose $20k premium). CPRT flat. Net portfolio modestly positive on longs, drag from short book.
delay.benefits: GOOGL core (Search, Cloud, YouTube); NVDA datacenter AI floor.
delay.hurt: PGR and LKQ shorts — option premium lost. Net drag from short book.

severity.name: Severity dominates frequency
severity.description: Repair cost inflation runs >8% annually. Heavier EVs and ADAS sensor costs push total claim costs up even as accidents decline. Insurance premiums rise, not fall.
severity.confirmingSignals: CCC severity >8% YoY for 4+ quarters; PGR combined ratio stable or improving; LKQ revenue per claim rising faster than volume declines.
severity.whatWouldHappen: PGR/LKQ shorts lose (capped at option premium). CPRT hedge gains significantly. GOOGL/NVDA longs unaffected. Portfolio net roughly flat on CPRT gains vs short losses.
severity.benefits: CPRT (more total losses = more auction volume). KS-1 triggered: proceeds reallocate to CPRT.
severity.hurt: PGR short thesis delayed. LKQ short partially offset by per-claim severity uplift.

blackswan.name: Fatal AV incident / moratorium
blackswan.description: A catastrophic AV incident triggers NHTSA/congressional moratorium. All AV expansion paused 12–24 months. Similar to Cruise shutdown in 2023.
blackswan.confirmingSignals: NHTSA emergency order; Waymo operational pause; congressional hearings initiated; Alphabet discloses Waymo operational halt.
blackswan.whatWouldHappen: GOOGL gives back 10–15% (Waymo write-down). NVDA modestly lower but retained on datacenter. PGR/LKQ shorts gain modestly. KS-3 triggered: close GOOGL/PGR/LKQ; retain NVDA and CPRT.
blackswan.benefits: PGR/LKQ shorts (AV pause = premium pool stability narrative). Cash reserve.
blackswan.hurt: GOOGL (Waymo component write-down). Entire AV-specific thesis paused.
